CLL_CNT_CALC 

LABEL: Claim Line Count — Calculated 

DESCRIPTION: The total number of lines on the claim within the TAF. 

SHORT NAME: CLL_CNT_CALC 

LONG NAME: CLL_CNT_CALC 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims (derived) 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 0–XXX
